name: BALCHEM CORP
summary: Balchem Corporation, incorporated in Maryland in 1967, develops, manufactures, distributes, and markets specialty performance ingredients and products for nutritional, food, pharmaceutical, animal health, plant nutrition, sterilization, fumigation, and industrial markets. Key products include choline nutrients, mineral amino acid chelates, vitamin K2, MSM, microencapsulated ingredients, ethylene oxide, propylene oxide, ammonia, and chelated minerals. The company operates three reportable segments: Human Nutrition and Health, Animal Nutrition and Health, and Specialty Products.
